project_type: Vanilla JavaScript SPA (ES Modules) - Agentic SLR Orchestrator Frontend
build_system: None - static files served directly, no build step
build_command: N/A - static site, no build step
verification_instructions: 1. Open index.html in a browser to verify no JS console errors. 2. Verify all new API methods exist in api.js. 3. Verify new UI components render correctly by checking HTML structure.
setup_instructions: No setup required - static HTML/CSS/JS project
environment_constraints: No build tools needed. Files are served statically. Uses CDN for marked.js and Google Fonts.
contribution_requirements: Follow existing code patterns: ES modules, glass-panel design system, existing naming conventions
key_patterns: 1. api.js: Universal apiFetch wrapper handles auth token injection and 401 redirect. API object exports all methods. 2. Components use ES module imports. 3. renderer.js handles all status-specific UI rendering with wrapCard helper. 4. UI uses glass-panel design, inline styles for dynamic content, modals via hidden class toggle. 5. File upload in renderer.js bypasses apiFetch and uses raw fetch (BUG: missing auth header). 6. Multipart uploads should NOT set Content-Type header (let browser set boundary).
directory_structure: Root: index.html (SPA), css/style.css, js/main.js (entry), js/api.js (API client), js/ui.js (utilities), js/components/ (auth.js, health.js, renderer.js, session.js, setup.js, tracker.js), api/openapi.json (spec)
